position: First element of the request-line (start-line) in HTTP/1.x
explanation: Indicates the operation to be performed on the target resource; recipients use the method token to determine request semantics and thereby which type of response to generate.

position: HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 pseudo-header field in the request header block (must appear before regular header fields)
explanation: Protocol-specific equivalent of the request-line method token for framing in HTTP/2/HTTP/3; used by recipients to distinguish the request operation and select response behavior (semantics correspond to the Method token).
